description_long: This is a tall, stone monument featuring a detailed sculpture of a robed human figure standing atop a rectangular pedestal. The figure appears to be holding an object in one hand and has a serene, contemplative expression, with draped garments that create deep folds and shadows. The pedestal is inscribed with text, including the name 'BURTON' prominently displayed at the base, and additional inscriptions on the front face. The monument sits on a slightly raised, mossy stone platform, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The rear of the sculpture shows weathering and discoloration, with the back of the robe and pedestal less detailed than the front. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, typical of a grave marker or memorial statue found in a cemetery or park.
description: A tall stone monument with a robed human figure atop a rectangular inscribed pedestal, showing weathering and moss at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed robed figure, clear inscriptions, and the name 'BURTON' on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped folds of the robe and partial visibility of the pedestal inscriptions.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure and pedestal, with visible weathering and less detail.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side profile of the figure and pedestal, with moss and weathering at the base.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure on a memorial pedestal
attribute_location_context: Outdoor grassy area, likely a cemetery or memorial park, as indicated by the moss and weathering.
